categories.title: Technical Seo
categories.description: Strategies for discoverability, rendering, indexation, performance, and technical search quality.

categories.title: Content Seo
categories.description: Strategies for useful, original, accessible, evidence-backed content aligned with search intent.

categories.title: Long Form Writing
categories.description: Strategies for researching, drafting, editing, and publishing books and other long-form work.

categories.title: Email Marketing
categories.description: Strategies for permission-based, accessible, privacy-conscious, measurable email campaigns.

capabilities.title: technical seo delivery
capabilities.description: Plan and deliver reviewable technical seo work.

capabilities.title: content seo delivery
capabilities.description: Plan and deliver reviewable content seo work.

capabilities.title: long form writing delivery
capabilities.description: Plan and deliver reviewable long form writing work.

capabilities.title: email marketing delivery
capabilities.description: Plan and deliver reviewable email marketing work.

constraints.title: Original Evidence-Backed Work
constraints.description: Require original work, attributable sources, verified claims, accessibility, privacy, and applicable compliance.

deliverables.title: technical seo deliverable
deliverables.description: A reviewed technical seo deliverable with recorded evidence.
